_provenance.source: GitHub search API via MCP (search_pull_requests total_count)
_provenance.metric: s = merged / (merged + closed_unmerged) = survival fraction of pull requests through the deterministic CI+review gate. Proposals (PRs) are the probabilistic generator; the gate is the deterministic evaluator; merged = survived.
_provenance.queries: repo:<R> is:pr is:merged   and   repo:<R> is:pr is:closed is:unmerged
_provenance.exclusion: Mega-repos whose closed-unmerged count is dominated by bot/ghstack mass-closures are EXCLUDED as confounded. Example (recorded, not used): pytorch/pytorch merged=6534 unmerged=120675 -> s=0.05, a bot/stale artifact, not a real gate rejection rate.

excluded_confounded.reason: bot/ghstack mass-closure dominates the unmerged count
